name: Mina's Baked Snapper
recipeIngredient: 1 Whole fish such as snapper, bream, porgy, sea bass
1 Head of fennel, sliced paper thin (fronds set aside -- chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F.
2. Clean and gut the fish, removing top and bottom fins, scale, and remove gills.
3. Place the fish upright in a shallow casserole dish large enough to hold it.
4. Pour wine over the fish and add olives, jalapenos, tomato sauce, fennel, and oregano.
5. Drizzle with olive oil.
6. Place in the oven and cook until just cooked through, about 20 to 25 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven, sprinkle with fennel fronds, and serve immediately.
(An excellent contorno for this dish would be tiny potatoes, roasted with garlic and rosemary.)
Yield: 4 servings
